Title

airport_daily_stats.Rd

Title

Usage

airport_daily_stats(.apdf, .apt = NULL, .yr = NULL, ...)

Arguments

.apdf

airport movement table

.apt

(optional) trim results to specific airport

.yr

(optional) filter for annual results

...

potential variables

Value

tibble of traffic counts

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
  airport_daily_stats(my_apdf_data, "LSZH")
} # }

On this page
